---
title: "weather plot"
format: html
---
This document retrieves historical weather data and displays the daily maximum temperatures for Portland, Oregon.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 6.5
#| dpi: 300

library(tidyverse)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(scales)

# Request data from ACIS API
params <- list(
  sid = "USW00024229",
  sdate = "1979-01-01",
  edate = "2021-12-31",
  elems = list(list(name = "maxt", interval = "dly"))
)

response <- POST(
  url = "https://data.rcc-acis.org/StnData",
  body = toJSON(params, auto_unbox = TRUE),
  content_type_json(),
  encode = "json"
)

res_data <- fromJSON(content(response, "text", encoding = "UTF-8"))

# Process and clean
portland_temps <- tibble(
  date = as.Date(res_data$data[, 1]),
  tmax = as.numeric(res_data$data[, 2])
) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(tmax))

# Create ggplot
ggplot(portland_temps, aes(x = date, y = tmax)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = tmax), alpha = 0.4, size = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(color = "#111111", method = "gam", formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs"), 
              linewidth = 1, linetype = "solid", se = TRUE, fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colors = c("#2166ac", "#67a9cf", "#d1e5f0", "#fddbc7", "#f4a582", "#d6604f", "#b2182b"),
    name = "Daily Max Temp (°F)"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "5 years",
    date_labels = "%Y",
    expand = c(0.01, 0.01)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(10, 120, by = 10),
    labels = paste0(seq(10, 120, by = 10), "°F")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Daily Maximum Temperatures in Portland, Oregon",
    subtitle = "Observations from Portland International Airport (1979 - 2021)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Daily Maximum Temperature (°F)",
    caption = "Source: NOAA ACIS API | Station ID: USW00024229"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, color = "#111111", margin = margin(b = 6)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, color = "#555555", margin = margin(b = 15)),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 8, color = "#777777", margin = margin(t = 12)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, color = "#222222", margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, color = "#222222", margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "#444444"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#ebebeb", linewidth = 0.4),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )
```
